text:
🎭 Disable web auto login | 禁用官方网页自动登录

When you click on the official Telegram website via Telegram Android, it automatically logs you into your current account, and now you can turn off this behavior.

当你通过 Telegram Android 点击 Telegram 官方网站时，会自动登录你的当前账号，现在你可以关闭这个行为。

POC: https://web.telegram.org

https://t.me/nasettings/general?r=DisableAutoWebLogin

#General @NagramTips

👀 Show time hint | 显示消息编辑时间

Click on the time in the bottom right corner of the message and a small window will pop up showing the edit time, send time, forward time, etc.

点击消息右下角的时间，将会弹出一个小窗口显示编辑时间、发送时间、转发时间等等

💬 **#ANNOUNCEMENT**

⁉️ **Did You Know About ****@SomniumBot****'s Python Package?**

🖥 If you're a python developer looking to add a AI creative edge to your projects, we encourage you to explore somnium package.

⚙️ **Installation:**
```python3 -m pip install somnium```
⁪⁬⁮⁮⁮⁮
🎮 **Usage:**
```from somnium import Somnium

# Get Styles (url)
print(Somnium.StylesGraph())

# Get Styles (list)
print(Somnium.Styles())

# Generate Artwork
print(Somnium.Generate('Cat', 2009))```
⁪⁬⁮⁮⁮⁮
🗣️ __Transform your projects with AI creativity! __[__Get started with docs now__](https://pypi.org/project/somnium/)__.__

Telejet 1.1.5 version 🚀

Subscribe buttons

Added buttons for subscribing to channels.
Buttons have been added to post headers in the main feed (+) and on the channels discovers screen too.

Many people and @TuckerCarlsonNetwork ask us:
- How much we spend on marketing the app?
- Our answer is zero! 🍆

📢 Group Profile Show Linked Channel Info | 群组详情页面显示详细的关联频道信息

This places a detailed preview of the latest channel message above group's bio.

群组详情页面将会展示关联频道详细信息

#UI @NagramTips

👤 Support copy fragment username | 支持复制典藏用户名

Telegram only supports copying as `t.me/xxx`, we've added an option that lets you copy as `@xxx`.

Telegram 仅支持复制 `t.me/xxx` 的格式，我们新增了一个选项让你可以复制为 `@xxx` 的格式

🙃 Copy Sticker Set | 复制整个贴纸包

Do you sometimes feel annoyed because you can't freely edit the sticker sets of your beloved being. Now you can copy all your beloved sticker sets and edit them freely after copying! Please use this feature wisely.

现在你可以复制所有你心爱的贴纸包，并且复制后可以自由编辑。请合理使用这个功能。

#UI @NagramTips

🙃 support choose new sticker short name | 创建新贴纸包时支持自定义简称

✈️ Telegram added client-side sticker pack creation feature in 10.10.0, but it was not possible to customize the short name, 🔥 Nagram fixed this issue.

✈️ Telegram 在 10.10.0 加入了客户端创建贴纸包功能，但无法自定义简称, 🔥 Nagram 修复了这个问题。

#UI @NagramTips

🙃 copy sticker as sticker or photo | 复制贴纸到剪贴板

Copy static stickers to clipboard as .webp or .png.

将静态贴纸作为 .webp 或者 .png 复制到剪贴板

#UI @NagramTips

🔎 Search type filters | 搜索指定类型的消息

When searching for messages you can specify that only some of the message types should be searched.

当搜索消息时你可以指定只搜索部分消息类型。

Thanks to @NekoUpdates

感谢 @NekoUpdates

**💬 ****#ANNOUNCEMENT**

🫐 **Introducing ****@ChosicBot****, your ultimate music companion**

📮 Finding your next **favorite track** is just a message away. Whether you know the **exact track** or **artist** you're craving, have a **spotify playlist** you can't get enough of, or simply want to explore a specific **genre**, **Chosic has got you covered!**

**💡 How To Use:**
    __- Send me any query
    - Use __`/recommend query`__ in groups
    - Type __`@ChosicBot help`__ for inline help__

**⚙️ Supported queries:**
    __- Song name/spotify link
    - Artist name/spotify link
    - Playlist spotify link
    - Genre name__

Telejet 1.1.0 version 🚀

Anonymous Browsing 

is a way you can control your privacy on Telejet.
You can use Anonymous Browsing when you want to browse the Telejet mobile app without associating your Telegram account.

Fully support features:

- Switching between accounts (anonymous and authorized)
- Searching in the community's catalog
- Joining communities
- Making your anonymous home feed

In addition, any features or actions that are tied to your account won’t be available while using Anonymous Browsing, including:

- Posting or commenting 
- Upvoting and downvoting 
- Chat and messaging (coming soon) ❤️

📧 **Temp Mails Online**
__
1. TempMail:
   - URL: __https://temp-mail.org/__
   - Description: Disposable email for temporary use, keeping personal email private.

2. Guerrilla Mail:
   - URL: __https://www.guerrillamail.com/__
   - Description: Anonymous, self-destructing email addresses for privacy online.

3. 10 Minute Mail:
   - URL: __https://10minutemail.com/__
   - Description: Temporary email addresses that expire in 10 minutes for quick and secure use.

4. Mailinator:
   - URL: __https://www.mailinator.com/__
   - Description: Publicly accessible inboxes for receiving temporary emails without an account.

5. YOPmail:
   - URL: __http://www.yopmail.com/__
   - Description: Quick and easy disposable email addresses for temporary communication.__

😀 **Introducing the ****@EternalGitaBot****!**

☄️ Embark on a spiritual journey with daily sloks from the sacred book Shrimad Bhagavad Gita.

📌 **Two Modes:**
   1. Random Mode: Receive a random slok every day.
   2. Series Mode: Receive sloks in sequential order.

🔔 **To set your preference, use the command:** `/cast`

🖥 **Other Commands:**
   - `/read` : Read the last left slok.
   - `/slok` : Get a random slok or specify a chapter and verse.
   - `/chapter` : Retrieve information about a specific chapter.
   - `/help` : Display available commands.
[ㅤ](https://telegra.ph/file/bc8c8fdf96750fdb62c37.jpg)

🔰 كيفية الحصول على مفتاح ترخيص IDM مدى الحياة (بدون كراك/فيروس)

1. أولاً ، قم بتنزيل IMD من موقع IDM
2. قم بتثبيت IDM على جهاز الكمبيوتر الخاص بك
3. الآن ابحث على Windows Search كلمة "PowerShell" وافتح PowerShell
